text:
Mizelle (ミゼル, Mizeru) was a member of the Kurta Clan. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 0, Chapter 1 

Background

Kurapika's Memories

Pairo mentions to Kurapika that Mizelle and Chikuta were originally outsiders until they decided to settle into the Kurta Clan. 

Six weeks after Kurapika leaves the Kurta village, Mizelle was killed by members of the Phantom Troupe, Mizelle had even more brutal injuries than the others, as the Kurtas who were from outside the clan were more injured, but they kept their eyes. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 0, Chapter 2 

Trivia

Mizelle is not mentioned in the anime adaptation, the Phantom Rouge movie.

References
